description_long: This is a brown paper grocery bag with a rectangular shape and a flat base, designed for carrying items. The front of the bag features a dark, stylized illustration of a seated figure, possibly in a traditional or cultural attire, adding a decorative element. The bag is equipped with a single loop handle made of cord, attached at two points near the top edge, allowing for easy carrying by hand. The back of the bag is plain, with no visible markings or designs. The sides of the bag are narrow and flat, indicating a typical paper bag construction. The bag appears empty, maintaining a crisp, uncreased form, and the opening is at the top, unobstructed and ready for use.
description: A brown paper grocery bag with a cord loop handle and a decorative illustration on the front. The bag is empty, with a top-facing opening and a plain back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown paper bag with a dark illustration of a seated figure and the cord handle attached at the top.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the bag and the cord handle extending upward, with no visible design.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain brown surface of the bag and the cord handle, with no illustration or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin edge and the cord handle.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Decorative illustration of a seated figure on the front
